TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-flood_waon a boong
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kakhayza'an tatini' pa'alowa' ka minayhael.
S.PHON: kakhajz~√∞a îan tatini î pa îalowa î ka minajh√¶l.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an tatini' pa'alowa' ka minayhael.
S.PHON: kakhajz~√∞a îan tatini î pa îalowa î ka minajh√¶l.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time, our ancestors told their descendants ...

S.FORM: mita' oemaeh ray horok.
S.PHON: mita î ≈ìm√¶h raj horok.
S.FORM: mita' oemaeh ray horok.
S.PHON: mita î ≈ìm√¶h raj horok.
S.TRANSL: In our flatland in the mountain,

S.FORM: mwai' ila 'aehae' mae'iyaeh rima' mayakai' ka(no) 'ima haebaean koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: mwai î ila î√¶h√¶ î m√¶ îij√¶h rima î majakai î ka(no) îima h√¶Œ≤√¶an ko Éa pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ka palono î.
S.FORM: mwai' ila 'aehae' mae'iyaeh rima' mayakai' ka(no) 'ima haebaean koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: mwai î ila î√¶h√¶ î m√¶ îij√¶h rima î majakai î ka(no) îima h√¶Œ≤√¶an ko Éa pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ka palono î.
S.TRANSL: There came a man who told the people to build a boat.

S.FORM: 'ima haebae'an mae'iyaeh toe'aewhay ka kai'.
S.PHON: îima h√¶Œ≤√¶ îan m√¶ îij√¶h t≈ì î√¶whaj ka kai î.
S.FORM: 'ima haebae'an mae'iyaeh toe'aewhay ka kai'.
S.PHON: îima h√¶Œ≤√¶ îan m√¶ îij√¶h t≈ì î√¶whaj ka kai î.
S.TRANSL: The people did not listen to him.

S.FORM: rima' kalkalsiri' ka mae'iyaeh sa'sa'iin 'aehae' taew'an koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: rima î kalkals~Œ∏iri î ka m√¶ îij√¶h s~Œ∏a îs~Œ∏a îiin î√¶h√¶ î t√¶w îan ko Éa pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ka palono î.
S.FORM: rima' kalkalsiri' ka mae'iyaeh sa'sa'iin 'aehae' taew'an koSa paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.PHON: rima î kalkals~Œ∏iri î ka m√¶ îij√¶h s~Œ∏a îs~Œ∏a îiin î√¶h√¶ î t√¶w îan ko Éa pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ka palono î.
S.TRANSL: He went around and told each family to build a boat.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh.
S.PHON: m√¶ îij√¶h îokaj pakai î s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh.
S.PHON: m√¶ îij√¶h îokaj pakai î s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.

S.FORM: koSa'en So moyo kay pakai' hini nila 'oemaeh 'am hinaw ila.
S.PHON: ko Éa î…ôn Éo mojo kaj pakai î hini nila î≈ìm√¶h îam hinaw ila.
S.FORM: koSa'en So moyo kay pakai' hini nila 'oemaeh 'am hinaw ila.
S.PHON: ko Éa î…ôn Éo mojo kaj pakai î hini nila î≈ìm√¶h îam hinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: He said that if they didn't believe, their land will sink.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh 'aehae' taew'an 'ima pakai'.
S.PHON: m√¶ îij√¶h îokaj pakai î s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh î√¶h√¶ î t√¶w îan îima pakai î.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay pakai' saboeh 'aehae' taew'an 'ima pakai'.
S.PHON: m√¶ îij√¶h îokaj pakai î s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh î√¶h√¶ î t√¶w îan îima pakai î.
S.TRANSL: Everybody did not believe him, except for one family.

S.FORM: kalahaengen noka noka koSa'en ka 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh isaa 'ima harai' ma rima' ka samiyan.
S.PHON: kalah√¶≈ã…ôn noka noka ko Éa î…ôn ka îima harai î m√¶ îij√¶h is~Œ∏aa îima harai î ma rima î ka s~Œ∏amijan.
S.FORM: kalahaengen noka noka koSa'en ka 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh isaa 'ima harai' ma rima' ka samiyan.
S.PHON: kalah√¶≈ã…ôn noka noka ko Éa î…ôn ka îima harai î m√¶ îij√¶h is~Œ∏aa îima harai î ma rima î ka s~Œ∏amijan.
S.TRANSL: The gods will protect those who believe.

S.FORM: o sizaeh 'ima pakai' mae'iyaeh paskayzaeh ila ka palono'.
S.PHON: o s~Œ∏iz~√∞√¶h îima pakai î m√¶ îij√¶h pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ila ka palono î.
S.FORM: o sizaeh 'ima pakai' mae'iyaeh paskayzaeh ila ka palono'.
S.PHON: o s~Œ∏iz~√∞√¶h îima pakai î m√¶ îij√¶h pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ila ka palono î.
S.TRANSL: After the dirty person, who is a god, convinced the family, they believed and started to build a boat.

S.FORM: paskayzaeh hini mwahil yo sobaoeh.
S.PHON: pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h hini mwahil jo s~Œ∏oŒ≤a≈ìh.
S.FORM: paskayzaeh hini mwahil yo sobaoeh.
S.PHON: pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h hini mwahil jo s~Œ∏oŒ≤a≈ìh.
S.TRANSL: The boat was wide and big.

S.FORM: hoenaehngewa 'atomal 'am paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: h≈ìn√¶h≈ã…ôwa îatomal îam pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h.
S.FORM: hoenaehngewa 'atomal 'am paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: h≈ìn√¶h≈ã…ôwa îatomal îam pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h.
S.TRANSL: It took a long time to build the boat.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: kajz~√∞√¶h ila pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h.
S.FORM: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh.
S.PHON: kajz~√∞√¶h ila pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h.

S.FORM: samiyan mwai' ila kita'.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏amijan mwai î ila kita î.
S.FORM: samiyan mwai' ila kita'.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏amijan mwai î ila kita î.
S.TRANSL: And the god came to see it.

S.FORM: koSa kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh niSo' ka palono.
S.PHON: ko Éa kajz~√∞√¶h ila pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ni Éo î ka palono.
S.FORM: koSa kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh niSo' ka palono.
S.PHON: ko Éa kajz~√∞√¶h ila pas~Œ∏kajz~√∞√¶h ni Éo î ka palono.
S.TRANSL: And said, your boat has been finished.

S.FORM: o So kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: o Éo kajz~√∞√¶h ila.
S.FORM: o So kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: o Éo kajz~√∞√¶h ila.

S.FORM: So noka hiza samiyan ka 'ima harai' sin'olan si'leb kasinpanan.
S.PHON: Éo noka hiz~√∞a s~Œ∏amijan ka îima harai î s~Œ∏in îolan s~Œ∏i îl…ôŒ≤ kas~Œ∏inpanan.
S.FORM: So noka hiza samiyan ka 'ima harai' sin'olan si'leb kasinpanan.
S.PHON: Éo noka hiz~√∞a s~Œ∏amijan ka îima harai î s~Œ∏in îolan s~Œ∏i îl…ôŒ≤ kas~Œ∏inpanan.

TRANSL.notes: The god, the man with dirty appearance, (called and) kept the animals inside.

S.TRANSL: The god, the man with dirty appearance, kept the animals inside.

S.FORM: sinpanan mwai' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏inpanan mwai î ila s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.
S.FORM: sinpanan mwai' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏inpanan mwai î ila s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.

S.FORM: palono' kayzaeh ila nisia.
S.PHON: palono î kajz~√∞√¶h ila nis~Œ∏ia.
S.FORM: palono' kayzaeh ila nisia.
S.PHON: palono î kajz~√∞√¶h ila nis~Œ∏ia.

S.FORM: 'a'apolon ila.
S.PHON: îa îapolon ila.
S.FORM: 'a'apolon ila.
S.PHON: îa îapolon ila.

S.FORM: ka si'oe'oe ila kasinpanan si'leb ila ray 'aehae' kas kaa'leban.
S.PHON: ka s~Œ∏i î≈ì î≈ì ila kas~Œ∏inpanan s~Œ∏i îl…ôŒ≤ ila raj î√¶h√¶ î kas~Œ∏ kaa îl…ôŒ≤an.
S.FORM: ka si'oe'oe ila kasinpanan si'leb ila ray 'aehae' kas kaa'leban.
S.PHON: ka s~Œ∏i î≈ì î≈ì ila kas~Œ∏inpanan s~Œ∏i îl…ôŒ≤ ila raj î√¶h√¶ î kas~Œ∏ kaa îl…ôŒ≤an.
S.TRANSL: They were called and kept in a room.

S.FORM: ka pazay ma' nonak ralom ma' nonak 'ahoe' ma' nonak mae'iyaeh ma' nonak.
S.PHON: ka paz~√∞aj ma î nonak ralom ma î nonak îah≈ì î ma î nonak m√¶ îij√¶h ma î nonak.
S.FORM: ka pazay ma' nonak ralom ma' nonak 'ahoe' ma' nonak mae'iyaeh ma' nonak.
S.PHON: ka paz~√∞aj ma î nonak ralom ma î nonak îah≈ì î ma î nonak m√¶ îij√¶h ma î nonak.
S.TRANSL: There was room for putting the rice and water, as well as for the animals and the family members.

S.FORM: pak'isaza pakas'aboeen ka sinpanan maybiil ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: pak îis~Œ∏az~√∞a pakas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì…ôn ka s~Œ∏inpanan majŒ≤iil ila ka m√¶ îij√¶h.
S.FORM: pak'isaza pakas'aboeen ka sinpanan maybiil ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: pak îis~Œ∏az~√∞a pakas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì…ôn ka s~Œ∏inpanan majŒ≤iil ila ka m√¶ îij√¶h.
S.TRANSL: The animals were brought first into the boat. The people entered last.

S.FORM: kas'aboe' rima' ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: kas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì î rima î ila hao îiz~√∞o î.
S.FORM: kas'aboe' rima' ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: kas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì î rima î ila hao îiz~√∞o î.

S.FORM: rima' sik noka hiza 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh noka samiyan koSa'en.
S.PHON: rima î s~Œ∏ik noka hiz~√∞a îima harai î m√¶ îij√¶h noka s~Œ∏amijan ko Éa î…ôn.
S.FORM: rima' sik noka hiza 'ima harai' mae'iyaeh noka samiyan koSa'en.
S.PHON: rima î s~Œ∏ik noka hiz~√∞a îima harai î m√¶ îij√¶h noka s~Œ∏amijan ko Éa î…ôn.
S.TRANSL: The dirty man said to them,

S.FORM: so rini' aboe' soks tasok soksok takahini takahini soksok.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏o rini î aŒ≤≈ì î s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ tas~Œ∏ok s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok takahini takahini s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok.
S.FORM: so rini' aboe' soks tasok soksok takahini takahini soksok.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏o rini î aŒ≤≈ì î s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ tas~Œ∏ok s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok takahini takahini s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok.

S.FORM: yako latar tasoksok iso'on 'inimon ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: jako latar tas~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok is~Œ∏o îon îinimon ila hao îiz~√∞o î.
S.FORM: yako latar tasoksok iso'on 'inimon ila hao 'izo'.
S.PHON: jako latar tas~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok is~Œ∏o îon îinimon ila hao îiz~√∞o î.
S.TRANSL: I will lock you inside from outside; you will be inside.

S.FORM: o So mwai' ka mae'iyaeh koSa haewaeh 'izi' ila i haewaeh.
S.PHON: o Éo mwai î ka m√¶ îij√¶h ko Éa h√¶w√¶h îiz~√∞i î ila i h√¶w√¶h.
S.FORM: o So mwai' ka mae'iyaeh koSa haewaeh 'izi' ila i haewaeh.
S.PHON: o Éo mwai î ka m√¶ îij√¶h ko Éa h√¶w√¶h îiz~√∞i î ila i h√¶w√¶h.
S.TRANSL: If somebody comes, do not open it.

S.FORM: o 'izi' 'atomal 'izi' haewaeh.
S.PHON: o îiz~√∞i î îatomal îiz~√∞i î h√¶w√¶h.
S.FORM: o 'izi' 'atomal 'izi' haewaeh.
S.PHON: o îiz~√∞i î îatomal îiz~√∞i î h√¶w√¶h.

S.FORM: ah inaray isaza soksokon aboe' soksokon latar.
S.PHON: ah inaraj is~Œ∏az~√∞a s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏okon aŒ≤≈ì î s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏okon latar.
S.FORM: ah inaray isaza soksokon aboe' soksokon latar.
S.PHON: ah inaraj is~Œ∏az~√∞a s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏okon aŒ≤≈ì î s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏okon latar.
S.TRANSL: The boat was locked from inside and outside.

S.FORM: honahai' mwai' ila ka 'a'oeral.
S.PHON: honahai î mwai î ila ka îa î≈ìral.
S.FORM: honahai' mwai' ila ka 'a'oeral.
S.PHON: honahai î mwai î ila ka îa î≈ìral.
S.TRANSL: It rained not long after that.

S.FORM: 'oeral ila sobaoeh ila ka 'a'oeral mwai' a ka ka 'a'oeral ni ka ka ka 'a'oeral sobaeoeh sobaeoeh ila naw.
S.PHON: î≈ìral ila s~Œ∏oŒ≤a≈ìh ila ka îa î≈ìral mwai î a ka ka îa î≈ìral ni ka ka ka îa î≈ìral s~Œ∏oŒ≤√¶≈ìh s~Œ∏oŒ≤√¶≈ìh ila naw.
S.FORM: 'oeral ila sobaoeh ila ka 'a'oeral mwai' a ka ka 'a'oeral ni ka ka ka 'a'oeral sobaeoeh sobaeoeh ila naw.
S.PHON: î≈ìral ila s~Œ∏oŒ≤a≈ìh ila ka îa î≈ìral mwai î a ka ka îa î≈ìral ni ka ka ka îa î≈ìral s~Œ∏oŒ≤√¶≈ìh s~Œ∏oŒ≤√¶≈ìh ila naw.
S.TRANSL: It rained not long after that, and the rain got bigger.

S.FORM: hani ka ray 'asang ka mae'iyaeh mwai' ila 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hani ka raj îas~Œ∏a≈ã ka m√¶ îij√¶h mwai î ila î≈ì î≈ì.
S.FORM: hani ka ray 'asang ka mae'iyaeh mwai' ila 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: hani ka raj îas~Œ∏a≈ã ka m√¶ îij√¶h mwai î ila î≈ì î≈ì.
S.TRANSL: Neighbors in the village came and called.

S.FORM: koSa haewaeh 'iniya'om ka palono' pakas'aboe' 'iniya'om.
S.PHON: ko Éa h√¶w√¶h îinija îom ka palono î pakas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì î îinija îom.
S.FORM: koSa haewaeh 'iniya'om ka palono' pakas'aboe' 'iniya'om.
S.PHON: ko Éa h√¶w√¶h îinija îom ka palono î pakas~Œ∏ îaŒ≤≈ì î îinija îom.
S.TRANSL: Open your boat; let us get in.

S.FORM: o hao 'izo' 'oe'oe koSa.
S.PHON: o hao îiz~√∞o î î≈ì î≈ì ko Éa.
S.FORM: o hao 'izo' 'oe'oe koSa.
S.PHON: o hao îiz~√∞o î î≈ì î≈ì ko Éa.

S.FORM: sihaewaeh.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏ih√¶w√¶h.
S.FORM: sihaewaeh.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏ih√¶w√¶h.
S.TRANSL: There's no way we can open it.

S.FORM: mayso poa'aw ila.
S.PHON: majs~Œ∏o poa îaw ila.
S.FORM: mayso poa'aw ila.
S.PHON: majs~Œ∏o poa îaw ila.

S.FORM: o hini rayno' ila haewaeh aboe'.
S.PHON: o hini rajno î ila h√¶w√¶h aŒ≤≈ì î.
S.FORM: o hini rayno' ila haewaeh aboe'.
S.PHON: o hini rajno î ila h√¶w√¶h aŒ≤≈ì î.
S.TRANSL: Where is a door that can be opened?

S.FORM: ki latar soksok ila.
S.PHON: ki latar s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok ila.
S.FORM: ki latar soksok ila.
S.PHON: ki latar s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok ila.
S.TRANSL: Both inside and outside were locked.

S.FORM: o 'akoy nanaw ka ralom ki a'oeral.
S.PHON: o îakoj nanaw ka ralom ki a î≈ìral.
S.FORM: o 'akoy nanaw ka ralom ki a'oeral.
S.PHON: o îakoj nanaw ka ralom ki a î≈ìral.

S.FORM: hani ka mae'iyaeh latar 'aroelon ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hani ka m√¶ îij√¶h latar îar≈ìlon ila s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.
S.FORM: hani ka mae'iyaeh latar 'aroelon ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hani ka m√¶ îij√¶h latar îar≈ìlon ila s~Œ∏aŒ≤≈ìh.
S.TRANSL: The people outside were all flooded away.

S.FORM: nasia ka palono' toliyab ila ray ralom babaw isa lasia 'aroe'aroelon ila 'aroelon 'aroe'aroelon rima'.
S.PHON: nas~Œ∏ia ka palono î tolijaŒ≤ ila raj ralom Œ≤aŒ≤aw is~Œ∏a las~Œ∏ia îar≈ì îar≈ìlon ila îar≈ìlon îar≈ì îar≈ìlon rima î.
S.FORM: nasia ka palono' toliyab ila ray ralom babaw isa lasia 'aroe'aroelon ila 'aroelon 'aroe'aroelon rima'.
S.PHON: nas~Œ∏ia ka palono î tolijaŒ≤ ila raj ralom Œ≤aŒ≤aw is~Œ∏a las~Œ∏ia îar≈ì îar≈ìlon ila îar≈ìlon îar≈ì îar≈ìlon rima î.
S.TRANSL: The boat floated on the water.

S.FORM: lasia pakai' ila koSa sa'oewaz hini ka 'oemaeh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia pakai î ila ko Éa s~Œ∏a î≈ìwaz~√∞ hini ka î≈ìm√¶h hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.FORM: lasia pakai' ila koSa sa'oewaz hini ka 'oemaeh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia pakai î ila ko Éa s~Œ∏a î≈ìwaz~√∞ hini ka î≈ìm√¶h hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: They believed what the man had said were true.

S.FORM: 'ita' hini' 'izo' ray palono' kakoway ila hini.
S.PHON: îita î hini î îiz~√∞o î raj palono î kakowaj ila hini.
S.FORM: 'ita' hini' 'izo' ray palono' kakoway ila hini.
S.PHON: îita î hini î îiz~√∞o î raj palono î kakowaj ila hini.
S.TRANSL: We inside the boat were rocking.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila i kita'i hani mita' saeng kakoway ila.
S.PHON: îoka î ila i kita îi hani mita î s~Œ∏√¶≈ã kakowaj ila.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila i kita'i hani mita' saeng kakoway ila.
S.PHON: îoka î ila i kita îi hani mita î s~Œ∏√¶≈ã kakowaj ila.
S.TRANSL: We sat down as the boat started to move.

S.FORM: ka sia hiza ka palono' kik raami hoenaehnge ila nanaw mastalay ila ray 'oka' ila i kakoway o.
S.PHON: ka s~Œ∏ia hiz~√∞a ka palono î kik raami h≈ìn√¶h≈ã…ô ila nanaw mas~Œ∏talaj ila raj îoka î ila i kakowaj o.
S.FORM: ka sia hiza ka palono' kik raami hoenaehnge ila nanaw mastalay ila ray 'oka' ila i kakoway o.
S.PHON: ka s~Œ∏ia hiz~√∞a ka palono î kik raami h≈ìn√¶h≈ã…ô ila nanaw mas~Œ∏talaj ila raj îoka î ila i kakowaj o.
S.TRANSL: The boat, we did not know what happened. It got stuck. It's not moving anymore.

S.FORM: o honahai' ila nanaw honahai' ila nanaw.
S.PHON: o honahai î ila nanaw honahai î ila nanaw.
S.FORM: o honahai' ila nanaw honahai' ila nanaw.
S.PHON: o honahai î ila nanaw honahai î ila nanaw.

S.FORM: ka lasia ma' 'okay haewaeh ka.
S.PHON: ka las~Œ∏ia ma î îokaj h√¶w√¶h ka.
S.FORM: ka lasia ma' 'okay haewaeh ka.
S.PHON: ka las~Œ∏ia ma î îokaj h√¶w√¶h ka.

S.FORM: sahoeroe ka katesnenan.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏ah≈ìr≈ì ka kat…ôs~Œ∏n…ônan.
S.FORM: sahoeroe ka katesnenan.
S.PHON: s~Œ∏ah≈ìr≈ì ka kat…ôs~Œ∏n…ônan.

TRANSL.notes: (since) they could not find a way out.

S.TRANSL: they could not find a way out.

S.FORM: taz 'ima ila kayzaeh ila nanaw 'oka' ila o naehaen ila kik kakoway hawaeh ila katesnenan.
S.PHON: taz~√∞ îima ila kajz~√∞√¶h ila nanaw îoka î ila o n√¶h√¶n ila kik kakowaj haw√¶h ila kat…ôs~Œ∏n…ônan.
S.FORM: taz 'ima ila kayzaeh ila nanaw 'oka' ila o naehaen ila kik kakoway hawaeh ila katesnenan.
S.PHON: taz~√∞ îima ila kajz~√∞√¶h ila nanaw îoka î ila o n√¶h√¶n ila kik kakowaj haw√¶h ila kat…ôs~Œ∏n…ônan.

TRANSL.notes: Everything stabled. The boat was not rocking anymore. (They) opened the door.

S.TRANSL: Everything stabled. The boat was not rocking anymore. opened the door.

S.FORM: rima' hawaeh Sa kita'en sa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.PHON: rima î haw√¶h Éa kita î…ôn s~Œ∏a hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.FORM: rima' hawaeh Sa kita'en sa hini ka kokool nonak ila.
S.PHON: rima î haw√¶h Éa kita î…ôn s~Œ∏a hini ka kokool nonak ila.

TRANSL.notes: They opened (the door), and saw the mountains were not the same.

S.TRANSL: They opened , and saw the mountains were not the same.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hoerok 'oka' ila ka kaehoey 'oka' ila ka hinbetel.
S.PHON: îoka î ila ka h≈ìrok îoka î ila ka k√¶h≈ìj îoka î ila ka hinŒ≤…ôt…ôl.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hoerok 'oka' ila ka kaehoey 'oka' ila ka hinbetel.
S.PHON: îoka î ila ka h≈ìrok îoka î ila ka k√¶h≈ìj îoka î ila ka hinŒ≤…ôt…ôl.
S.TRANSL: The flatland was not there. The trees were not there. The grassland was not there.

S.FORM: m kwakwasan ila.
S.PHON: m kwakwas~Œ∏an ila.
S.FORM: m kwakwasan ila.
S.PHON: m kwakwas~Œ∏an ila.

S.FORM: lasia koSa 'am kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia ko Éa îam kajz~√∞√¶h ila.
S.FORM: lasia koSa 'am kayzaeh ila.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia ko Éa îam kajz~√∞√¶h ila.
S.TRANSL: They said everything would be all right.

S.FORM: kaka noka ka kas kakasrayan ka.
S.PHON: kaka noka ka kas~Œ∏ kakas~Œ∏rajan ka.
S.FORM: kaka noka ka kas kakasrayan ka.
S.PHON: kaka noka ka kas~Œ∏ kakas~Œ∏rajan ka.

S.FORM: o sia 'am rima' ila matawaw.
S.PHON: o s~Œ∏ia îam rima î ila matawaw.
S.FORM: o sia 'am rima' ila matawaw.
S.PHON: o s~Œ∏ia îam rima î ila matawaw.

S.FORM: kiim ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka paz~√∞aj.
S.FORM: kiim ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka paz~√∞aj.
S.TRANSL: He went to look for rice.

S.FORM: hawaeh hawaeh kasinpanan.
S.PHON: haw√¶h haw√¶h kas~Œ∏inpanan.
S.FORM: hawaeh hawaeh kasinpanan.
S.PHON: haw√¶h haw√¶h kas~Œ∏inpanan.

S.FORM: koSa 'am mari' ila ka pazay tatokoeh ray 'oem'oemah.
S.PHON: ko Éa îam mari î ila ka paz~√∞aj tatok≈ìh raj î≈ìm î≈ìmah.
S.FORM: koSa 'am mari' ila ka pazay tatokoeh ray 'oem'oemah.
S.PHON: ko Éa îam mari î ila ka paz~√∞aj tatok≈ìh raj î≈ìm î≈ìmah.
S.TRANSL: They took rice to plant on the land.

S.FORM: hawaeh soksok 'es'es atomalan.
S.PHON: haw√¶h s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok î…ôs~Œ∏ î…ôs~Œ∏ atomalan.
S.FORM: hawaeh soksok 'es'es atomalan.
S.PHON: haw√¶h s~Œ∏oks~Œ∏ok î…ôs~Œ∏ î…ôs~Œ∏ atomalan.

S.FORM: lasia mangowip ila ka paalowa'an mita' koSa ka noka samiyan koSa o hini ka 'am nak hini a hawaeh ka binsi'.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia ma≈ãowip ila ka paalowa îan mita î ko Éa ka noka s~Œ∏amijan ko Éa o hini ka îam nak hini a haw√¶h ka Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î.
S.FORM: lasia mangowip ila ka paalowa'an mita' koSa ka noka samiyan koSa o hini ka 'am nak hini a hawaeh ka binsi'.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia ma≈ãowip ila ka paalowa îan mita î ko Éa ka noka s~Œ∏amijan ko Éa o hini ka îam nak hini a haw√¶h ka Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î.
S.TRANSL: The have forgotten how to open it as the gods have instructed them.

S.FORM: lasia mari' ka binsi' tasi' noka 'aewhaes ila lasia kaas ila hao latar lobih mwai' liboe' naehaen ri'sason ray huk ay palono' 'izo'.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia mari î ka Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î tas~Œ∏i î noka î√¶wh√¶s~Œ∏ ila las~Œ∏ia kaas~Œ∏ ila hao latar loŒ≤ih mwai î liŒ≤≈ì î n√¶h√¶n ri îs~Œ∏as~Œ∏on raj h*k aj palono î îiz~√∞o î.
S.FORM: lasia mari' ka binsi' tasi' noka 'aewhaes ila lasia kaas ila hao latar lobih mwai' liboe' naehaen ri'sason ray huk ay palono' 'izo'.
S.PHON: las~Œ∏ia mari î ka Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î tas~Œ∏i î noka î√¶wh√¶s~Œ∏ ila las~Œ∏ia kaas~Œ∏ ila hao latar loŒ≤ih mwai î liŒ≤≈ì î n√¶h√¶n ri îs~Œ∏as~Œ∏on raj h*k aj palono î îiz~√∞o î.
S.TRANSL: The mice set free returned to the boat and built their nest there.

S.FORM: hinbetel pahaengal lasia sekela Sa hini kayzaeh ila ka.
S.PHON: hinŒ≤…ôt…ôl pah√¶≈ãal las~Œ∏ia s~Œ∏…ôk…ôla Éa hini kajz~√∞√¶h ila ka.
S.FORM: hinbetel pahaengal lasia sekela Sa hini kayzaeh ila ka.
S.PHON: hinŒ≤…ôt…ôl pah√¶≈ãal las~Œ∏ia s~Œ∏…ôk…ôla Éa hini kajz~√∞√¶h ila ka.

TRANSL.notes: The mice saw (the inside of the boat).

S.FORM: kakasrayan noka mae'iyaeh katokohan.
S.PHON: kakas~Œ∏rajan noka m√¶ îij√¶h katokohan.
S.FORM: kakasrayan noka mae'iyaeh katokohan.
S.PHON: kakas~Œ∏rajan noka m√¶ îij√¶h katokohan.
S.TRANSL: The grassland is where they could get down and stay to do planting.

S.FORM: ka aewhaes si'ael ka 'i'ih ka balihaeh sanhowangen rima' si'ael ka pazay ki binsi'.
S.PHON: ka √¶wh√¶s~Œ∏ s~Œ∏i î√¶l ka îi îih ka Œ≤alih√¶h s~Œ∏anhowa≈ã…ôn rima î s~Œ∏i î√¶l ka paz~√∞aj ki Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î.
S.FORM: ka aewhaes si'ael ka 'i'ih ka balihaeh sanhowangen rima' si'ael ka pazay ki binsi'.
S.PHON: ka √¶wh√¶s~Œ∏ s~Œ∏i î√¶l ka îi îih ka Œ≤alih√¶h s~Œ∏anhowa≈ã…ôn rima î s~Œ∏i î√¶l ka paz~√∞aj ki Œ≤ins~Œ∏i î.
S.TRANSL: The mice gnawed a hole on the wood and ate the rice and seed.

S.FORM: 'am raiw ila nisia roSa' ka kinseman phangal noka sapang mae'iyaeh parayliz.
S.PHON: îam raiw ila nis~Œ∏ia ro Éa î ka kins~Œ∏…ôman pha≈ãal noka s~Œ∏apa≈ã m√¶ îij√¶h parajliz~√∞.
S.FORM: 'am raiw ila nisia roSa' ka kinseman phangal noka sapang mae'iyaeh parayliz.
S.PHON: îam raiw ila nis~Œ∏ia ro Éa î ka kins~Œ∏…ôman pha≈ãal noka s~Œ∏apa≈ã m√¶ îij√¶h parajliz~√∞.
S.TRANSL: When they were about to leave, the two bundles of rice hanging were grabbed away.

S.FORM: ta koSa mari'in lasia parayliz mari'in sitokoh tokoh kita'en 'aehae' ho'ol 'aehae' bolasih 'in'alay zi'saza sia.
S.PHON: ta ko Éa mari îin las~Œ∏ia parajliz~√∞ mari îin s~Œ∏itokoh tokoh kita î…ôn î√¶h√¶ î ho îol î√¶h√¶ î Œ≤olas~Œ∏ih îin îalaj z~√∞i îs~Œ∏az~√∞a s~Œ∏ia.
S.FORM: ta koSa mari'in lasia parayliz mari'in sitokoh tokoh kita'en 'aehae' ho'ol 'aehae' bolasih 'in'alay zi'saza sia.
S.PHON: ta ko Éa mari îin las~Œ∏ia parajliz~√∞ mari îin s~Œ∏itokoh tokoh kita î…ôn î√¶h√¶ î ho îol î√¶h√¶ î Œ≤olas~Œ∏ih îin îalaj z~√∞i îs~Œ∏az~√∞a s~Œ∏ia.
S.TRANSL: They planted those millets that they took back. When those millets grew up, they found that there are two kinds: one is glutinous rice and the other Zai-lai rice.

S.FORM: ka maysosowaw haebaeaen ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: ka majs~Œ∏os~Œ∏owaw h√¶Œ≤√¶√¶n ila ka m√¶ îij√¶h.
S.FORM: ka maysosowaw haebaeaen ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: ka majs~Œ∏os~Œ∏owaw h√¶Œ≤√¶√¶n ila ka m√¶ îij√¶h.
S.TRANSL: More and more people there were.

S.FORM: o haebaeaen ila ka 'asang.
S.PHON: o h√¶Œ≤√¶√¶n ila ka îas~Œ∏a≈ã.
S.FORM: o haebaeaen ila ka 'asang.
S.PHON: o h√¶Œ≤√¶√¶n ila ka îas~Œ∏a≈ã.
S.TRANSL: More and more tribes there were.

S.FORM: hayza ila ka hapoy.
S.PHON: hajz~√∞a ila ka hapoj.
S.FORM: hayza ila ka hapoy.
S.PHON: hajz~√∞a ila ka hapoj.

S.FORM: hayza' ila ka raan.
S.PHON: hajz~√∞a î ila ka raan.
S.FORM: hayza' ila ka raan.
S.PHON: hajz~√∞a î ila ka raan.
